content: Platform format splitting uses --- separators which may miss pages in subsections without separators
scrapy-magicfields disabled due to BaseItem removal in Scrapy 2.14 — find replacement or implement inline
Spider only works from llms.txt entry point — add mode for crawling individual page URLs directly
RoundRunner executeRound uses mock scoring — wire to actual quality scoring pipeline
infer() wraps Anthropic SDK but needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY — add graceful error when key missing
NeonDeltaFetchMiddleware needs runtime.http_cache table creation — add to migration 002
Channel server SSE listener has no backpressure — add max client limit
ETL function uses REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY but view needs UNIQUE index first
Runner spawns Scrapy via execSync — should use spawn for streaming output and timeout handling
Luhn check for credit cards may false-positive on UUIDs — add UUID exclusion pattern
orchestrateResearch synthesizeResults is a stub — needs LLM call for real synthesis
Table conversion only handles simple tables — nested tables and colspan not supported
Efficiency metrics: tool_calls/pages_crawled time series with gap analysis — extension wired into settings.py
A/B experiment infrastructure: variant definitions, runner, scoring for comparing tool strategies
SpotifyStatsSpider: crawls Spotify GitHub org for stat/measurement packages with variant support
Round 11: Modern stat/measurement packages from Spotify org with A/B experiment integration
20 missing module errors (TS2307) — @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, node:http, node:fs, node:path, node:os type declarations not found. Run npm install or verify @types/node is installed
8 missing global errors (TS2580/TS2584) — process, Buffer, console not found. tsconfig lib is ES2022 only; either add @types/node to dependencies or include 'dom' in lib
3 implicit any errors (TS7006) — callback params in server.ts:133 (request), server.ts:389 (notification), plugin-index.ts:196 (line) need explicit type annotations
vitest module not found in test files — ensure vitest is installed and tsconfig includes test paths
12 unused variable warnings (TS6133) — remove unused imports: SenderId, toChatId, assertNever, BUILTIN_PLUGINS, RuntimeRecord, ReportingRecord, SemanticRecord, MetricDefinition, DimensionDefinition
Style management module: branded types, Result<T,E>, 4 presets + 2 custom styles (TypeScript Strict, Dimensional Modeler), Kimball star schema (006/007 migrations), ETL with pg_cron
